name: nexvault
description: NexVault — Enterprise Non-Custodial Multi-Chain Crypto Wallet

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server && npm run build:admin
scripts.test: npm run test:client && npm run test:server
scripts.setup: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install
